summary: Email feature testing complete. All backend APIs (GET /api/emails, PUT /api/emails/{id}/read, PUT /api/emails/read-all) and frontend UI working correctly. Demo login buttons work with new @in.gt.com emails. Email icon visible in Navbar with unread count badge. Email panel opens showing role-specific emails. 6 coachees now exist in the system.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend GET /api/emails correctly filters emails by to_user_id (user isolation working)
Backend PUT /api/emails/{id}/read correctly marks single email as read
Backend PUT /api/emails/read-all correctly marks all user's emails as read
All emails use @in.gt.com domain as required
Platform email is Elevate@in.gt.com as required
Frontend EmailPanel.js uses data-testid attributes for testing
Email panel shows From/To/CC headers when expanded
Email body renders HTML content correctly using dangerouslySetInnerHTML
Unread count badge updates correctly when emails are marked as read
Seed data creates 40 demo emails across all user types
seed_data_creation: Backend seed.py creates 13 users (6 coaches, 6 coachees, 1 admin) and 40 demo emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email feature fully tested. Demo login buttons use @in.gt.com emails. Email icon (data-testid='email-icon') in Navbar shows unread count badge (data-testid='email-count'). Email panel (data-testid='email-panel') opens on click. Each email has data-testid='email-{id}'. Clicking email expands it showing full body with From/To/CC headers. Mark all read button works. Coach sees coach-specific emails (availability requests, guidelines, reminders). Coachee sees coachee-specific emails (registration, preferences, introduction, details, feedback). Admin sees admin emails (registration notifications, coach confirmations, journey completions). 6 coachees now exist: Sarah, Alex, Priya, Rohan, Ananya, Vikram.
